commentaries.author: Cyril of Alexandria
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh My hand also has laid the foundation of the earth, and my right hand has spread out the heavens: when I call unto them, they stand up together. Cyril of Alexandria Now the hand and the right arm is what God the Father calls his Son. And we often find him so called throughout Scripture. The divine Moses said, “Your right hand has been glorified in might, your right hand has shattered the enemies,” and David the blessed said, “May your hand be strengthened, may your right arm be lifted up.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: He is the Lord’s right hand, indeed his two hands, by which he worked and constructed the universe. - "Against Hermogenes 45"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
